/usr/bin/g++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g -O0 -DDEBUG CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_uuid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_byte_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_http_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_cas_layout.cpp.o -o unit_tests  ../libminis3_lib.a /usr/local/lib/libgtest.a /usr/local/lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lmysqlclient ../_deps/yaml-cpp-build/libyaml-cppd.a /usr/local/lib/libspdlog.a /usr/local/lib/libgtest.a
